description: belts are an integral part of all fashionable ensembles, be it casual or formal. This belt from lino perros is set to amp up your style quotient and add an urban cool to your attire. Made of Leatherette and coated yarn for durability, comfort and style Braided style belt with a metal connector Stylish tang clasp to customise Fit Care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
